program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Implement the AIControlRule tenant scope field so tenant_id values are canonical, required, same-tenant checked against a Tenant context, and rejected when cross-tenant before HermesGate model work begins.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P01.M02.S03 in implemented state.
Adds AI_CONTROL_RULE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY with canonical lfos_ lowercase snake-case tenant_id rules and next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S01.
Adds normalizeAIControlRuleTenantId, validateAIControlRuleTenantId, and assertAIControlRuleTenantScope exports.
Binds AI_CONTROL_RULE_MODEL.tenantScopePolicy and validateAIControlRule to the tenant scope policy.
Updates createAIControlRule to store canonical tenant_id values returned by the tenant normalizer.
Extends the synthetic fixture with ai_control_rule_tenant_scope evidence matching the AIControlRule record and fixture Tenant record.
Extends the RP00 validator and README with machine checks for the S03 tenant scope field slice.
non_goals: Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not implement HermesGate, ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, or BlockedClaim.
Does not replace H00, C00, or human approval.
Does not close RP00.P01, RP00, or RP00.P01.M03.S01.
claude_questions: Does RP00.P01.M02.S03 implement only the AIControlRule tenant scope field slice, with HermesGate model work deferred to RP00.P01.M03.S01?
Does the tenant scope policy enforce required tenant_id, lfos_ stable prefix, lowercase snake-case canonical pattern, stored-whitespace rejection, and rejection of noncanonical tenant IDs?

Do normalizeAIControlRuleTenantId, validateAIControlRuleTenantId, assertAIControlRuleTenantScope, validateAIControlRule, and createAIControlRule consistently preserve canonical tenant scope without weakening fail-closed AI authority rules from S01/S02?
Does assertAIControlRuleTenantScope reject cross-tenant references and accept same-tenant string/object contexts?
Does the synthetic fixture avoid real data and prove the AIControlRule tenant_id matches the fixture Tenant record?
Does the validator enforce S03 exports, fixture validation, cross-tenant rejection, next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S01, and no-write H00 evidence before production_ready?
risk_focus: Claiming HermesGate or RP00.P01.M03 work from the AIControlRule tenant-scope slice.
Accepting noncanonical or cross-tenant tenant IDs that would weaken permission, audit, or AI action isolation.
Weakening existing AIControlRule forbidden hard-stops while adding tenant normalization.
Skipping actual Claude C00 review or construction inspection before production_ready.
